name: royal chamber
hints: The bricked up window blocks access to a ledge. You need to make a hole in it.
The HELP says to blow it up. You need something explosive. Think about what you found in the swamp.
Use swamp gas (collected in the bladder) and the flint & steel to create an explosion.
LIGHT GAS (with flint & steel in inventory) to blow a hole in the bricked up window. Then GO LEDGE to reach the chasm ledge.

needs: Bricked up window with a hole in it (must be in room)

notes: The bricked-up window must be blown open using swamp gas (collected with the wine bladder in room 1) and flint & steel (from room 30). Once open, GO LEDGE reaches the chasm ledge (room 19). DOWN returns to the anteroom (room 9).
